free_text: The Munich  HVEC MP tandem accelerator.
SM-144 target with enrichment 96.5%, thickness of
135 mug/cm**2, evaporated on 18 mug/cm**2 carbon foils
The absolute uncertainty is about 5%, the relative
uncertainties of the cross section of the individual
levels depend on counting statistics and line-shape
integration. The statistical uncertainties exceed a
value of 5% for cross section below 10 mu-b/sr, in
this cases they are indicated in the figures.
.The error is reported by authors on fig.
